name: Davao City Heritage & Wildlife Discovery
hookLine: Meet the world's largest eagle and taste award-winning chocolate in one unforgettable day
whyThisTour: Most tourists only see Davao's malls. This tour takes you to the places that make Davao legendary - from the critically endangered Philippine Eagle to world-class cacao farms.

highlights.title: Philippine Eagle Encounter
highlights.desc: Get closer to the world's largest eagle than you ever thought possible

highlights.title: Chocolate Museum
highlights.desc: Taste Malagos chocolate straight from Davao's award-winning cacao farm

highlights.title: Kadayawan Village
highlights.desc: Walk through traditional houses of 11 indigenous tribes

faqs.a: The tour continues rain or shine. Indoor alternatives are available.
Yes, suitable for all ages including children.
Comfortable shoes, sunscreen, camera, and water bottle.
Yes, from any Davao City hotel or accommodation.

addOns.name: Professional Photographer
addOns.desc: A professional photographer captures your tour highlights

addOns.name: Upgrade to Private Tour
addOns.desc: Exclusive tour for your group only

name: Samal Island Beach & Dive Experience
hookLine: Crystal waters, coral gardens, and the most beautiful sunset in Mindanao
whyThisTour: Samal Island is just 15 minutes from Davao City but feels like another world. This tour shows you the best beaches, snorkeling spots, and the legendary Hagimit Falls.

highlights.title: Coral Garden Snorkeling
highlights.desc: Swim among vibrant coral reefs teeming with tropical fish

highlights.title: Beach Relaxation
highlights.desc: Private beach access at one of Samal's best resorts

highlights.title: Island Hopping
highlights.desc: Visit hidden coves accessible only by boat

inclusions: Boat transfer from Santa Ana Wharf

faqs.a: Diving is available as an add-on. Additional fee applies.

faqs.q: Do I need to know how to swim?
faqs.a: Life vests are provided for snorkeling. Basic comfort in water is recommended.

addOns.name: Sunset Cruise
addOns.desc: Private boat ride to watch the Samal sunset

name: Mt. Apo Summit Trek - 3 Days
hookLine: Conquer the highest peak in the Philippines and stand above the clouds
whyThisTour: Mt. Apo is not just a mountain. It is the rooftop of the Philippines at 2,954 meters - a place where mossy forests, geothermal vents, and endemic wildlife create a landscape found nowhere else on Earth.

highlights.title: Summit at 2,954m
highlights.desc: Stand at the highest point in the Philippines above the clouds

highlights.title: Mossy Forest
highlights.desc: Trek through an ancient forest draped in moss and orchids

highlights.title: Lake Venado
highlights.desc: Camp beside a legendary crater lake at 2,200 meters

faqs.q: How fit do I need to be?
faqs.a: You should be able to hike 6-8 hours per day with a daypack. Prior trekking experience is strongly recommended.
The operator monitors weather closely. Climbs may be rescheduled for safety. Full refund if cancelled by operator.
Camping gear (tent, sleeping bag) is provided. You need your own trekking clothes, boots, and personal items.

addOns.name: Professional Guide Photo Package
addOns.desc: Dedicated photographer documenting your entire climb
